languages.text: "Я уже говорил вам, господа: вы будете осмотрены в порядке очереди! Прошу вас, не отвлекайте от работы меня и уж тем более Лорд-капитана!"
"Master Toliman, as I have already told you both: you will be seen when you reach the front of the queue! Now I have work to do, please do not distract me, or, Throne forbid, the Lord Captain!"
languages.original_text: "Я уже говорил вам, господа: вы будете осмотрены в порядке очереди! Прошу вас, не отвлекайте от работы меня и уж тем более Лорд-капитана!"

traits.locale_text: "Master Toliman, as I have already told you both: you will be seen when you reach the front of the queue! Now I have work to do, please do not distract me, or, Throne forbid, the Lord Captain!"
"Master Toliman, as I have already told you both: you will be seen when you reach the front of the queue! Now I have work to do, please do not distract me, or, Throne forbid, the Lord Captain!"
"Master Toliman, as I have already told you both: you will be seen when you reach the front of the queue! Now I have work to do, please do not distract me, or, Throne forbid, the Lord Captain!"

languages.text: 「マスター・トリーマン、もうお二人に言いましたね。順番の列の最前まで来たら、お二人とも見られますよ。今、仕事があるので、邪魔しないでください。そして、神が許さないことですが、船長様にも邪魔しないでください！」
languages.original_text: "Master Toliman, as I have already told you both: you will be seen when you reach the front of the queue! Now I have work to do, please do not distract me, or, Throne forbid, the Lord Captain!"

languages.text: "Üstat Toliman, ikinize de daha önce söylediğim gibi... Sıra size geldiğinde muayene edileceksiniz! Şimdi yapacak işlerim var. Lütfen beni ya da Taht korusun, Lord Kaptan'ı meşgul etmeyin!"
languages.original_text: "Master Toliman, as I have already told you both: you will be seen when you reach the front of the queue! Now I have work to do, please do not distract me, or, Throne forbid, the Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: "Üstat Toliman, ikinize de daha önce söylediğim gibi... Sıra size geldiğinde muayene edileceksiniz! Şimdi yapacak işlerim var. Lütfen beni ya da Taht korusun, Lord Kaptan'ı meşgul etmeyin!"

languages.text: “托里曼阁下，我已多次告知二位：轮到你们时自然会得到诊治！现在我还有工作要做，请不要打扰我，更不要——黄金王座在上——打扰舰长大人！”
languages.original_text: "Master Toliman, as I have already told you both: you will be seen when you reach the front of the queue! Now I have work to do, please do not distract me, or, Throne forbid, the Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: “托里曼阁下，我已多次告知二位：轮到你们时自然会得到诊治！现在我还有工作要做，请不要打扰我，更不要——黄金王座在上——打扰舰长大人！”

languages.text: "Meister Toliman, ich sage es Euch gerne noch einmal: Ihr werden behandelt, sobald Ihr den Beginn der Schlange erreicht. Und jetzt habe ich zu tun, also stört mich nicht länger ... und lasst den Lord Captain in Ruhe, beim Thron."
languages.original_text: "Master Toliman, as I have already told you both: you will be seen when you reach the front of the queue! Now I have work to do, please do not distract me, or, Throne forbid, the Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: "Meister Toliman, ich sage es Euch gerne noch einmal: Ihr werden behandelt, sobald Ihr den Beginn der Schlange erreicht. Und jetzt habe ich zu tun, also stört mich nicht länger ... und lasst den Lord Captain in Ruhe, beim Thron."

languages.text: « Maître Toliman, comme je vous l'ai déjà expliqué, vous serez reçus en consultation quand votre tour viendra ! Sur ce, j'ai du travail qui m'attend, alors cessez de m'interrompre et, pire encore, de faire perdre son temps {mf|au seigneur-capitaine|à la seigneure-capitaine} ! »
languages.original_text: "Master Toliman, as I have already told you both: you will be seen when you reach the front of the queue! Now I have work to do, please do not distract me, or, Throne forbid, the Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: « Maître Toliman, comme je vous l'ai déjà expliqué, vous serez reçus en consultation quand votre tour viendra ! Sur ce, j'ai du travail qui m'attend, alors cessez de m'interrompre et, pire encore, de faire perdre son temps {mf|au seigneur-capitaine|à la seigneure-capitaine} ! »

languages.text: «Maestro Toliman, como ya le he dicho, ¡se les atenderá cuando llegue a su lugar en la cola! Ahora tengo trabajo que hacer, así que dejen de distraernos a mí, y, por el trono, a{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán!».
languages.original_text: "Master Toliman, as I have already told you both: you will be seen when you reach the front of the queue! Now I have work to do, please do not distract me, or, Throne forbid, the Lord Captain!"

traits.locale_text: «Maestro Toliman, como ya le he dicho, ¡se les atenderá cuando llegue a su lugar en la cola! Ahora tengo trabajo que hacer, así que dejen de distraernos a mí, y, por el trono, a{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán!».
